name: go-high-level-mcp-server
description: GoHighLevel MCP Server v2.1 — 100% official GHL API coverage, generated endpoint tools, daily API drift PRs, Streamable HTTP, MCP SDK 1.26

scripts.scan:ghl-api: node scripts/scan-ghl-api-coverage.mjs --refresh && node scripts/generate-official-spec-tools.mjs && node scripts/scan-ghl-api-coverage.mjs && node scripts/classify-local-endpoints.mjs
scripts.ci:ghl-api-drift: npm run scan:ghl-api && git diff -- docs/GHL-API-COVERAGE-REPORT.md docs/GHL-LOCAL-ENDPOINT-CLASSIFICATION.md docs/ghl-api-coverage.json src/tools/official-spec-tools.ts src/tools/official-spec-endpoints.json && test -z "$(git status --porcelain -- docs/GHL-API-COVERAGE-REPORT.md docs/GHL-LOCAL-ENDPOINT-CLASSIFICATION.md docs/ghl-api-coverage.json src/tools/official-spec-tools.ts src/tools/official-spec-endpoints.json)"
